summary: Nicobar is a D2C lifestyle brand based in Delhi, offering modern Indian home and apparel products. It was founded by the team behind Good Earth and focuses on contemporary design with Indian roots.
business_model: Direct-to-consumer e-commerce, premium home and apparel, with retail stores in Tier-1 cities
india_presence: Headquarters in Delhi, retail stores in major cities like Mumbai, Bengaluru, and online pan-India
positioning_implications: Lead with experience in e-commerce, design, and brand building
interview_implications: Expect questions on design thinking, brand strategy, and cross-functional collaboration
